title: saxifraga marshallii subsp. idahoensis
intro: Saxifraga marshallii subsp. idahoensis, also known as Idaho saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the saxifrage family, characterized by its unique, compact growth habit and delicate white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Saxifraga marshallii subsp. idahoensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exerting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Saxifraga marshallii subsp. idahoensis is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its availability and use may be limited due to its limited cultivation and geographical distribution.
